justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the Tuesday of next week at 15h" as June 9th at 15:00 and then correctly understood the user's subsequent requests for Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then offered a refined set of options based on the user's follow-up preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, combining information gathering and offering alternatives without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear options and confirming the booking without any friction or jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context throughout the conversation, intelligently expanding its search and offering relevant alternatives after the initial request was unavailable.
